query:
SELECT bookTitle, authorName, coverImageUrl, summary IS NOT NULL as hasSummary
FROM book_profiles 
WHERE coverImageUrl IN ('not-found','skipped') OR summary IS NULL OR summary = ''
ORDER BY bookTitle
LIMIT 30;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT bookTitle, authorName, coverImageUrl, summary IS NOT NULL as hasSummary
FROM book_profiles 
WHERE coverImageUrl IN ('not-found','skipped') OR summary IS NULL OR summary = ''
ORDER BY bookTitle
LIMIT 30;

rows.bookTitle: Misbehaving The Making of Behavior Economics by Richard H. Thaler
